zh.lifeSummary: Countess Constance Buchan於1080年11月8日出生在蘇格蘭費伏。她於大約1118年與Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife在蘇格蘭費伏結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1166年在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾費費 肖享年86歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Countess Constance Buchan于1080年11月8日出生在苏格兰費伏。她于大约1118年与Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife在苏格兰費伏结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1166年在英国苏格兰雷福福爾費費 肖享年86岁，埋葬在苏格兰費伏。

nameMeanings.name: Buchan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (eastern): habitational name from a district north of Aberdeen. There was also a barony of Buchquane in Strathore, Fife, a settlement called Buchan in Kirkcudbrightshire, and several other places in Scotland so named, but these are less likely to be the source of the surname.
Americanized form of Croatian and Serbian Bućan or of its Croatian variant Bučan: from a hypocoristic derivative of the personal names Budimir, Budislav, or Budivoj (see Budin ).
Americanized form of Slovenian Bučan: topographic name derived from buč ‘well in the field’, or a habitational name from the village called Buč, from the same word.

variants.name: Budin
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Budy, the name of a village in Ukraine and another in Belarus.
Slovenian and Croatian: from the personal name Budin, a short form of (Old) Slavic compound names based on the element bud ‘to inspire’ (from buditi), as for example Budislav ‘inspiring glory’.

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

en.lifeSummary: Countess Constance Buchan was born on 8 November 1080, in Fife, Scotland. She married Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife about 1118, in Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1166, in Fyfe Shore, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 86, and was buried in Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Countess Constance Buchan est née le 8 novembre 1080, à Fife, Écosse. Elle a épousé Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife environ 1118, à Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1166, à Fyfe Shore, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Fife, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Countess Constance Buchan wurde am 8. November 1080 in Fife, Scotland geboren. Sie hat um 1118 in Fife, Scotland Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1166 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Fyfe Shore, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Fife, Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Countess Constance Buchanは1080年11月8日にスコットランドフィフで生まれた。約1118年にスコットランドフィフでGillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fifeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1166年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアフイフ ショアで86歳で死去し，スコットランドフィフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Countess Constance Buchan(은)는 1080년 11월 8일 스컷랜드 피프에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1118년 스컷랜드 피프에서 Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1166년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 피프 쇼어에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Countess Constance Buchan родилась 8 ноября 1080 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife около 1118 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1166 г. в местности фиф шаур, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности фиф, Шотландия.
